text.title: django-pytest-fixtures Decision Tree

decision-tree.root-question: Does the test that consumes this fixture touch the database?

branch.conclusion: db_fixture="none". Pure pytest fixture, no Django marker.

branch.question: Does the test assert on transaction.on_commit / signals / select_for_update?

branch.conclusion: db_fixture="transactional_db". Slower, but real transaction semantics fire.
db_fixture="db". Wraps test in savepoint; rolls back after.

branch.question: Is the fixture data mutable (different tests may modify)?

branch.conclusion: scope="function". Each test gets a fresh copy.

text.example: fixture=static_countries, read-only reference list, used by every test q-needs-db -> true q-needs-real-tx -> false => db_fixture="db" q-mutable -> false q-shared-where -> 'all-tests' => scope="session"
